title: Jacquemontia evolvuloides

This family consists of over 1,600 species, spread across 50 genera. Jacquemontia evolvuloides is specifically placed in the genus Jacquemontia, which is native to tropical regions of the world. The genus Jacquemontia is known to have around 50 species, with Jacquemontia evolvuloides being one of them. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics, such as its flower structure and leaf arrangement.
